cross_scene_arcs.title: From Adversary to Ally with Bower
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nadia starts by attacking Bower for tools, then reluctantly guides him, builds trust through escapes and cooperation, emotionally motivates him to continue, rescues him in the reactor bay, and awakens with him on an alien world.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cooperative partner conscious with Bower in a new environment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Their survival and relationship in the unfamiliar world.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Guardian of the Ecological Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nadia reveals her role protecting ecological specimens in the Bio-Vault, motivates the group to persist with the mission, shows empathy by saving a child hunter, and is shocked by the revelation that the ship is underwater.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Self-appointed protector of specimens with 30% loss.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mission status uncertain after discovering the ship's underwater location.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to proceed with the ecological mission given the new reality.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Empathetic Leadership in Crises
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nadia uses her ID to escape hunters, prevents the killing of a child hunter out of empathy, and asserts leadership by rescuing Bower and commanding Leland in dangerous situations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Resourceful guide with special access escaping threats.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Assertive team member who intervenes morally and physically.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Balancing empathy with survival needs in ongoing threats.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Memory of Evalon
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bower awakens with memory loss, discovers a photo of Evalon, experiences flashbacks, and realizes she is aboard the one-way mission ship, prompting urgent questions about her location.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Awake with no memory of Evalon or mission details.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotionally shaken and actively seeking Evalon's whereabouts.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to find Evalon's exact location on the ship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance and Survival
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bower's authority is challenged by Shepard, leading to confrontation and flight from hunters; he later de-escalates a standoff with Nadia and forms an alliance with Tanaka.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Attempting to assert command as a corporal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Authority diminished, forced into survival mode, but establishing new alliances.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The identity of the 'new CO' and the ongoing threat from hunters.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reactivating the Elysium
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bower discovers the powerless ship, gathers information from crew members, shifts from despair to determination, and partially activates the reactor control panel.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Disoriented on a derelict ship with no power.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Partial reactor activation achieved, but full systems remain offline.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the reactor can be fully restored and if help can be reached via radio.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Partnership with Nadia
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bower encounters Nadia's hostility, but she challenges his despair, supports him during the reactor mission, and they awaken together in an alien world.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cooperative partnership, surviving together in a new environment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to survive or proceed in the unfamiliar alien world.
